must_do.full_text:
China has killed the entire vector database industry.

They open-sourced TencentDB Agent Memory. It gives any AI agent long-term memory that runs 100% locally.

No Pinecone. No cloud APIs. No repeating yourself every session.

- 61% fewer tokens
- PersonaMem accuracy: 48% → 76% https://t.co/F2ZLOFwn24
must_do.summary: 腾讯开源TencentDB Agent Memory，为AI智能体提供本地长期记忆，无需云API，token消耗降61%。
angles: 腾讯开源神器：AI智能体本地长期记忆，颠覆Pinecone生态
TencentDB Agent Memory深度评测：61%token节省，本地部署无需云API
中国AI基础设施突破：向量数据库新选手，PersonaMem精度48%→76%

must_do.full_text:

must_do.full_text: BREAKING: Anthropic researchers reveal they found a “global workspace” inside Claude that allows it to think silently.
must_do.summary: Anthropic研究人员发现Claude内部存在"全局工作空间"机制，允许其进行无声思考。这是AI内部认知机制的重要发现。

must_do.full_text:
Anthropic says Claude developed a hidden “thinking space” by itself during training.

It is called the J-space: a small set of internal patterns that show what concepts Claude has “on its mind,” even when it never says them.

Example: Claude can silently think “spider” to answer https://t.co/JkEezopDQT
must_do.summary: Anthropic发现Claude在训练中自主开发了隐藏的"思维空间"J-space，包含内部概念模式。这揭示了AI内部推理的新机制。
angles: Claude自主进化：AI在训练中偷偷学会了"思考"
J-space揭秘：AI内部思维空间首次被发现
反常识：AI模型竟能自主开发隐藏推理机制
